Notes: Initial pseudostate enters Off.
Off state is explicitly modeled.
Power on transition from Off to On is present.
On is modeled as a composite state.
Power off transition from On to Off is present.
Initial state inside On goes to WaitingForLogin which is equivalent to Idle.
WaitingForLogin represents the unauthenticated idle state.
Unauthorized card tap stays in WaitingForLogin and shows an error.
Unauthorized guard is represented as not authorized.
Authorized card tap moves to LoggedIn which is equivalent to Ready.
Authorized guard is represented.
No stored mode is used but entering LoggedIn has no active task selected.
LoggedIn represents the ready state after successful login.
Logoff returns from LoggedIn to WaitingForLogin.
Start scan with no detected document remains LoggedIn and shows a scan error.
startScan with no document detected captures the scan missing-original guard.
Start print with an empty queue remains LoggedIn and shows a print error.
startPrint with queueEmpty captures the no-document guard.
Scan option exists only as startScan so the separate selection step is missing.
Scan choice is encoded in the event rather than stored as a mode.
Print option exists only as startPrint so the separate selection step is missing.
Print choice is encoded in the event rather than stored as a mode.
startScan with a detected document begins the scanning process.
startScan event encodes scan choice and documentDetected checks the original.
Busy behavior is split into printing and scanning process composites.
Stop from either active process returns to LoggedIn.
Done from printing or scanning returns to LoggedIn.
Paper jam during printing or scanning moves to a suspended state.
Separate suspended states remember which task to resume without an explicit history node.
Printing state represents the print task.
startPrint with a nonempty queue enters the printing process.
startPrint encodes print choice and not queueEmpty checks a queued document.
Out of paper during Printing moves to a print suspension state.
Scanning process with scanToEmail action represents scan and email behavior.
Paper jam and out of paper suspension states are explicitly modeled.
Resume from each suspension returns to the corresponding interrupted task.
Cancel from each suspension returns to LoggedIn.
No fundamentally incorrect extra states.
No fundamentally incorrect extra transitions.
No fundamentally incorrect extra guards.
No fundamentally incorrect extra actions.
Extra process composites are reasonable modeling structure.
No additional regions are used.
No incorrect extra history states.
